title: Fire test congress and monitor end-to-end

log.context: Fire test congress and monitor end-to-end

The test3 workflow was **terminated** (event 27 = WORKFLOW_EXECUTION_TERMINATED). Someone or something terminated it. The workflow status 5 = `WORKFLOW_EXECUTION_STATUS_TERMINATED`. The monitoring loop just saw no new terminal events within its view until it ended.

The key issues found:

1. **`claude-opus-4-6` is an invalid model name** — causes Anthropic to return `400 invalid_request_error`. This affects `hiring-manager` and the fired persona `galactus`.

2. **The clunger process was crashing...(truncated)
